headline: Union Pacific Rail Deal Ties Domestic Supply To Valuation Opportunity
summary: Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) has signed a seven year contract with Rocky Mountain Steel Mills for U.S. steel rail supply. The agreement supports domestic manufacturing and is linked to Rocky Mountain Steel’s planned solar powered rail mill, a more than US$1b investment. The contract is aimed at supporting network reliability, rail industry efficiency, and track safety across Union Pacific’s system. For you as an investor, this deal relates directly to how Union Pacific sources a core input for...

headline: Shipper groups ask STB to make key UP-NS merger agreement documents public
summary: Shippers want federal regulators to disclose confidential terms under which Union Pacific could walk away from its proposed merger with Norfolk Southern. The post Shipper groups ask STB to make key UP-NS merger agreement documents public appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Union Pacific to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: UNP heads into Q1 earnings with modest growth expected, but rising costs, geopolitical tensions and recent misses may cloud the outlook.

headline: Union Pacific Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
summary: OMAHA, Neb., April 16, 2026--Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will release first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. ET. The company’s management team will host a conference call and live webcast at 8:45 a.m. ET.
